info.name: Telecom Plan Advisor — LLM Service
info.description:
Complete test suite for the Python FastAPI LLM microservice.
All requests are pre-loaded with realistic dummy data.

Base URL: http://localhost:8001

Endpoints:
  GET  /health
  POST /api/v1/intent
  POST /api/v1/recommendation
  POST /api/v1/billing/prorate
  POST /api/v1/summary

variable.description: Base URL of the running FastAPI service. Change port if needed.

request.description:
Verifies the FastAPI service is running and that the local Ollama server is reachable with the configured model loaded.

Expected response:
{
  "status": "ok",
  "ollama_model": "llama3.2",
  "ollama_reachable": true
}

Classifies the customer's free-form message into a structured intent.

Expected identified_intent: TRAVEL_INQUIRY or DATA_BOOSTER_REQUEST

response.name: 200 OK — TRAVEL_INQUIRY

body.raw:
{
  "customer_context": {

request.description:
Customer: Priya Sharma
Tenure: 36 months (loyalty eligible)
Usage: 4.7/5 GB used (94%) + 950 MB roaming
Query: Frequent US travel, runs out of data

Expected recommendation: Premium Unlimited (plan_id: 3) — covers both unlimited data and US roaming in one plan.

response.name: 200 OK — Recommended Premium Unlimited
response.body:
{
  "recommended_plan_id": 3,
  "recommended_plan_name": "Premium Unlimited",
  "reasoning": "The customer frequently travels to the US and is nearly at her data limit. Premium Unlimited covers both needs: unlimited domestic data and free US roaming.",
  "current_plan_summary": {
    "plan_id": 1,
    "plan_name": "Basic 5GB",
    "monthly_cost": 19.99,
    "data_limit_gb": 5,
    "key_benefits": [],
    "suitable_for": "Light domestic usage only"
  },
  "recommended_plan_summary": {
    "plan_id": 3,
    "plan_name": "Premium Unlimited",
    "monthly_cost": 59.99,
    "data_limit_gb": 9999,
    "key_benefits": [],
    "suitable_for": "Frequent international travel + heavy data users"
  },
  "personalized_message": "Given your monthly US trips and near-full data usage, upgrading to Premium Unlimited will keep you connected without any roaming worries."
}

request.description:
Customer: Arjun Mehta
Tenure: 8 months
Usage: 2.1 GB only, zero roaming
Query: Wants to downgrade to save money

Expected recommendation: Basic 5GB (plan_id: 1) — downgrade scenario.

body.raw:
{
  "customer_id": "CUST-1042",
  "billing_cycle_date": "2026-03-01",
  "change_date": "2026-03-10",
  "current_plan": {
    "plan_id": 1,
    "plan_name": "Basic 5GB",
    "plan_type": "BASE_PLAN",
    "monthly_cost": 19.99,
    "data_limit_gb": 5,
    "description": "Entry-level domestic data plan"
  },
  "new_plan": {
    "plan_id": 3,
    "plan_name": "Premium Unlimited",
    "plan_type": "BASE_PLAN",
    "monthly_cost": 59.99,
    "data_limit_gb": 9999,
    "description": "Unlimited data with free US roaming"
  },
  "applied_discount_percentage": 20
}

request.description:
Scenario: Customer switches from Basic 5GB ($19.99) to Premium Unlimited ($59.99) on day 10 of the billing cycle, with a 20% loyalty discount applied.

Manual calculation:
  days_remaining = 30 - (10 Mar - 01 Mar) = 30 - 9 = 21 days
  credit         = 19.99 × (21/30) = $13.99
  charge         = 59.99 × (21/30) = $41.99
  discount       = 41.99 × 20%     = $8.40
  total          = 41.99 - 13.99 - 8.40 = $19.60

response.name: 200 OK — Pro-rated amount calculated
response.body:
{
  "customer_id": "CUST-1042",
  "old_plan_name": "Basic 5GB",
  "new_plan_name": "Premium Unlimited",
  "days_remaining_in_cycle": 21,
  "credit_for_unused_days": 13.99,
  "charge_for_new_plan": 41.99,
  "discount_applied": 8.40,
  "prorated_billed_amount": 19.60,
  "explanation": "Switching from Basic 5GB to Premium Unlimited with 21 days remaining. Credit $13.99, new charge $41.99, discount $8.40. Total billed: $19.60."
}

request.description: Scenario: Upgrade from Basic ($19.99) to Standard ($34.99) on day 15. No discount applied.

request.description: Scenario: Customer adds a US Roaming Pack ($15) on day 5 of the billing cycle. No discount.

Generates a structured audit summary of a completed copilot conversation for storage in the Copilot_Interactions MySQL table.

Scenario: Customer asked about US travel plans, was shown a recommendation, confirmed the upgrade, and the change was executed.

Expected outcome: 'Plan upgraded to Premium Unlimited'
Expected follow_up_required: false

response.name: 200 OK — Conversation summarised
response.body:
{
  "customer_id": "CUST-1042",
  "interaction_id": "INT-20260310-001",
  "identified_intent": "TRAVEL_INQUIRY",
  "llm_summary": "Customer Priya Sharma enquired about a plan better suited for frequent US travel. The copilot recommended Premium Unlimited ($59.99/month) which includes free US roaming. Customer confirmed the upgrade and the plan change was executed with a pro-rated charge of $19.60.",
  "outcome": "Plan upgraded to Premium Unlimited",
  "follow_up_required": false
}

item.name: POST /api/v1/summary — FAQ only, no action taken

request.description:
Scenario: Customer queried a billing charge. Copilot explained it. No plan change was made.

Expected outcome: 'Billing query resolved'
Expected follow_up_required: false

Scenario: Customer received an incorrect SMS about loyalty eligibility. Issue escalated to human agent.

Expected outcome: 'Escalated to human agent'
Expected follow_up_required: true
